title: bidens formosa
intro: Bidens formosa, also known as cobbler's pegs, is a perennial herb belonging to the aster family and native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Bidens formosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Bidens formosa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
